I just beat the story mode for this game here’s my review.
I like how each planet gets longer and has more mini quests. And the puzzles were good too, had me thinking for a couple of minutes in infernia (I’m dumb😔) I absolutely HATE glacirion. When I went into the aquatic research area, a mined the frozen ice and I dove right in and oh my GOD i was absolutely TERRIFIED. I HATE deep Waters. Took me 3 weeks…yes 3 WEEKS just to complete it. Why? Nobody wanted to help me with it😭 and some people did but they ended up leaving me behind. Anyways the final planet was really good. The boss fight was decent, it’s a bit buggy but still good overall. And the mini chase thing when you go down the zip line and the red skull thingy starts chasing you, it was perfect. Overall, this game is super amazing. I love everything about it.I definitely recommend to play it!

reviews.review_title: I have no optimization and i must slop
reviews.review_description:
it’s just cube runners but space, this game gives its staff team WAY too much stuff (especially the entity bs like omg dude🥹)
the zero gravity mechanic is genuinely underutilized (main gameplay feature btw ✌️)  and the game is poorly optimized despite the games graphics and models looking really basic and dookie, I can barely walk in 20 player lobbies without being stuck to floor, the game just freeze's for a bit everytime another player joins and the really scuffed gamemodes that don’t really fit the whole “space” aesthetic that were probably just made 4 filler

The game is good, yeah. BUT i think in verdantia the trees that move after you flee the facility are way too hard to get past, i feel like you could yknow, nerf them? You dont gotta though, and otherwise - This game is awesome sauce.

This game is one of the best vr games I have played and seen It has good game modes and story mode and other things there’s tons of cosmetics and it’s just a good game to chill about in and enjoy the realms are cool and the entites are cool really good game!
10/10.

The game is good. 

Graphics: 4 Stars

The graphics are pretty good. The dynamic lighting is pretty good as well. 

Storymode: 3 Stars

Story mode is pretty good except for the fact it's a bit unbalanced. For example, Verdantia's tree part where they come alive is a bit too hard for beginners considering its the first planet and that its just too much in total to multitask and manage. Also some of the models do seem a bit rushed, like the lava blob in Infernia. Whenever the storymode revamp comes out, maybe these will be worked on. 

Game modes: 4 Stars

The game modes are pretty fun, however it doesn't really fit into the space/astrology vibe of the game. They also don't include any lore towards the game, however I don't know if that was intentional. 

Entities/Entity update: 2 Stars

Whenever the Kolosal update came out, it REALLY changed the game more than you think, for more negative than positive in my opinion. Firstly, most of the entities were based of of different IPs, mostly Outcome memories. This update made it so that it is literally impossible to join codes now because people just sit in the lobby waiting for a designer/moderator to join instead of just playing the game. It is genuinely so annoying to not be able to join a lobby because someone is taking up server space just not doing ANYTHING inside the game. For example: Beashty. Before this update, you could join a lobby and see people actually playing the game instead of sitting in the lobby until their headset dies.

Game optimization: 2 Stars

The game optimization in this game is horrible. If you join a 20 player lobby, you are literally bolted to the floor like glue. Not to mention that this is a huge problem in story mode and game modes. Lag is also caused when you look a certain direction for some reason. Especially for the new realm. 

Overall: 3 Stars
I love it SO MUCH! I play it everyday and make new friends on it, all of the things are amazing and people are really kind.

Now... before you crucify me, I think the game has really good potential. And I would confirm that if I could JOIN A CODE? Whenever I try to join a private server, it won't let me! And when I walk out, it just says "Please connect to a server!" The thing is, I can't connect to a server! Please, fix this.

reviews.review_title: Locate the dagger, avoid the ghouls.. 🍷
reviews.review_description:
Hello there. You have met a terrible, terrible demise. But uh you know, I… I don’t feel too bad about it. After all, if it weren’t for me, it would have just been from someone else. You know, … I guess what I’m trying to say is LIFE. Life goes on. Well, for everyone else, life goes on. Not for you. You’re- you’re about to be dead. But that’s not about what’s going on here. All right. (sigh) 
     It reminds me of one other day in a cave. I was having a delightful picnic with my good friend Astro. And I said to him, I said, 
"Astro, I have a story."
       And he said to me, "What’s the type of story?"
    And I said to him, "Astro, this story is going to be insane." Sometimes, you know, the story is just a story. You try to read into every little thing and find meaning in everything anyone says. Uh if you do that you’ll just drive yourself crazy. I had a friend do it once. Wasn’t pretty. We talked about it for years, And not only that, but you’ll likely end up believing something that you shouldn’t believe, thinking something you shouldn’t think or *stutters* - or assuming something.. you shouldn’t assume. You know, sometimes that’s *stutters* - that’s what I said. Uh a story is just a story. 

So, just be quiet for once second of your life and eat your sandwich. Okay. Of course, it was only then I’d realised I’d made the sandwiches. But you-
    Do you want to know a fun fact?

      "⚜️🔰Spiders, have eight legs. And I myself would know because I’m a spider🔰⚜️"         - Larry 27:63

    I’m not from here, though. I’ll be honest, I kind of just wanted to explore other planets because I was bored. Then I made a small home down this hallway and it seems you just walked over to here. Kind of disrespectful…..
    OH, OH. Okay. I see. I see. It’s because you’re trying to hide from that one monster down the hall.. Yeah, that’s my neighbour. He’s very nice. You should get to know him. Well, maybe not when he’s trying to kill you. 
     Either way, doesn’t matter. You’re stuck  here with me now buddy. A gooood ol’ spider……
      You seem annoyed. Am I… bothering you?…. Maybe? Probably not. Well look, you’re about to die, so you really shouldn’t be in a rush anyways……. Don’t back away all scared or anything. It’s going to be fine. After all, it’s your fault for intruding into my lovely home. That wasn’t very nice of you, by the way.
      Anyways, um- I just want to get back to my reading. So, it’s time we say goodbye. So well, goodbye is a strong word. There’s many ways to say goodbye like goodbye and goodbye or you could say it in a different language. Like au revoir is French, maybe. I’ll be honest, I don’t speak these languages. Uh, adios is Spanish, arrivederci is Italian and the list goes on. Uh, aloha in Hawaiian, it’s also hello, but it’s basically the same thing. Bless in Icelandic, there’s a lot of ways to say goodbye. Alright.
      Well, umm…, uhh…


                  Goodbye. :)
